The '''Eighth Fleet''' was one of the nine main fleets of the [[Galactic Alliance Defense Fleet|Navy]] under the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]] government during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]] in [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]].<ref name="Tempest 1">''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]''</ref> It had been created after the Alliance victory in the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] in [[30 ABY/Legends|30 ABY]], and perhaps even during the Corellian crisis itself.

The Eighth Fleet was one of the two [[Hapan]] [[Hapan Royal Navy|fleets]], along with the [[Seventh Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Seventh Fleet]], incorporated into the Galactic Alliance Navy.<ref name="TEA" />

During the Second Galactic Civil War, it was one of three fleets assigned to [[General Crix Madine Military Reserve|Crix Base]] in the [[Coruscant system/Legends|Coruscant system]], along with the [[Third Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Third]] and [[Ninth Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Ninth]].<ref name="Tempest 1" /> In this role, the Eighth Fleet apparently served as the main defense of [[Coruscant/Legends|the Galactic capital]]: the Third Fleet was assigned first to maneuvers in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] and then to the [[blockade of Corellia]],<ref name="Bloodlines 1">''[[Legacy of the Force: Bloodlines]]''</ref> while the Ninth was an enigmatic new command.<ref name="Tempest 1" />

The Seventh and Eighth Fleets finally defected from the Galactic Alliance when the [[Hapes Consortium/Legends|Hapes Consortium]] joined the [[Jedi Coalition]]. Both fleets then fought at the [[Second Battle of Roche]] along with the [[Alliance-in-exile]], the [[Maw Irregular Fleet]] and the [[Confederation]] fleets while the [[Hapan Home Fleet]] remained in the [[Hapes Cluster/Legends|Hapes Cluster]].<ref name="TEA" />
